notes: All 6 calendar-upgrade features shipped in round 1:
- calendar-api-enhancements: range query (start/end) + attendees extraction on CalendarEvent.
- calendar-date-navigation: left/right arrows, month wrap, 'Today' prefix in header.
- calendar-views: day/week/agenda modes via v key cycle; week uses range API.
- calendar-jump-to-date: Ctrl+G opens date input; parses ISO + 'May 1' + 'MM/DD/YYYY' formats.
- calendar-event-editing: e key enters inline edit mode; Enter saves via PUT /calendar/events/{id}, Esc cancels.
- calendar-multiday-attendees: multiday all_day events rendered across spanned days in week/agenda; attendees with ✅/❌/❓/⏳ status icons in detail pane.
